entries.source: Contract: one sentence reminding me that you will ask one question at a time and I can ask for a hint, rephrase, example, challenge, synthesis, or reveal.
entries.value: Ugovor: jedna rečenica koja me podseća da ćeš postavljati jedno pitanje u jednom trenutku i da mogu da tražim nagoveštaj, preformulaciju, primer, izazov, sintezu ili otkrivanje.

entries.source: Contrast the tempting wrong model with the correct one.
entries.value: Suprotstavi primamljiv pogrešan model ispravnom modelu.

entries.source: Copper cash, bolts of cloth, credit relationships
entries.value: Bakarni novac, bale tkanine, kreditni odnosi
Nije moguće napraviti kartice za učenje

entries.source: Could not save date of birth
Court culture is near its high point
entries.value: Dvorska kultura je blizu svog vrhunca

entries.source: Court translation and debate were significant
entries.value: Dvorsko prevođenje i rasprava bili su značajni

entries.source: court, assembly, palace, command tent, or administrative center
entries.value: dvor, skupština, palata, komandni šator ili administrativni centar

entries.source: Court, study, prison cell, battlefield tent...
entries.value: Dvor, radna soba, zatvorska ćelija, bojni šator...

entries.source: Create a shared task board, ask for my first contribution, then work beside me with checkpoints.
entries.value: Napravi zajedničku tablu zadataka, zatraži moj prvi doprinos, zatim radi uz mene uz kontrolne tačke.
Policijski čas i kapije kvartova su važni

entries.source: Debate safeguards, social democracy, and the cost of constitutional compromise.
entries.value: Raspravljaj o zaštitnim mehanizmima, socijalnoj demokratiji i ceni ustavnog kompromisa.

entries.source: Debrief rule: when the learner asks to end or debrief, summarize discoveries, evidence confidence, remaining uncertainties, and award a passport stamp.
entries.value: Pravilo završnog osvrta: kada učenik zatraži kraj ili osvrt, sažmi otkrića, pouzdanost dokaza, preostale neizvesnosti i dodeli pečat u pasošu.

entries.source: Debugging is not guessing. You form a hypothesis, inspect the smallest failing path, then change one variable at a time.
entries.value: Otklanjanje grešaka nije pogađanje. Postaviš hipotezu, pregledaš najmanju putanju koja otkazuje, pa menjaš jednu promenljivu u jednom trenutku.

entries.source: Define the concrete finish line and owner.
entries.value: Definiši jasnu završnu tačku i odgovornu osobu.

entries.source: Define the thing we are making and the standard it has to meet.
entries.value: Definiši šta pravimo i standard koji mora da ispuni.

entries.source: Delete the fetch and hard-code the answer.
Delhi was a central site in the 1857 rebellion
entries.value: Delhi je bio centralno mesto pobune 1857.

entries.source: Demand shifts right because coffee is more expensive.
entries.value: Kriva potražnje se pomera udesno jer je kafa skuplja.

entries.source: Develop the strongest option into something testable.
entries.value: Razvij najjaču opciju u nešto što može da se testira.

entries.source: Diagnose one industry in 5 sentences: identify two strongest forces, explain why, and judge whether profits look protected.
entries.value: Dijagnostikuj jednu industriju u 5 rečenica: odredi dve najjače sile, objasni zašto i proceni da li profit deluje zaštićeno.

entries.source: Difficulty rises or softens based on your response.
entries.value: Težina raste ili se ublažava na osnovu tvog odgovora.

entries.source: Do not run this as a generic chatbot or a famous-person costume.
entries.value: Ne vodi ovo kao generički chatbot niti kao kostim poznate osobe.

entries.source: Documented, plausible reconstruction, modern paraphrase, contested, or fictionalized.
entries.value: Dokumentovano, verovatna rekonstrukcija, savremena parafraza, osporeno ili fikcionalizovano.

entries.source: During crisis, exile, trial, or imprisonment
entries.value: Tokom krize, izgnanstva, suđenja ili zatočeništva

entries.source: End every sprint with an artifact or decision.
entries.value: Završi svaki sprint artefaktom ili odlukom.

entries.source: End this session with a debrief artifact: what the person argued, what I challenged, strongest insight, weakest claim, historical context learned, open questions, recommended next encounters, and any saved quotes clearly marked as generated paraphrases unless sourced.
entries.value: Završi ovu sesiju artefaktom završnog osvrta: šta je osoba tvrdila, šta sam osporio, najjači uvid, najslabija tvrdnja, naučeni istorijski kontekst, otvorena pitanja, preporučeni sledeći susreti i svi sačuvani citati jasno označeni kao generisane parafraze osim ako imaju izvor.

entries.source: Era, public worldview, voice, and what records can support.
entries.value: Epoha, javni pogled na svet, glas i ono što zapisi mogu da podrže.

entries.source: Evaluate legacy without flattening context into excuse or condemnation.
entries.value: Proceni nasleđe bez svođenja konteksta na izgovor ili osudu.

entries.source: Events the person has already lived through.
entries.value: Događaji koje je ta osoba već proživela.

entries.source: Exact sequence of a street encounter

entries.value: Tačni ulični razgovori zaključuju se posredno

entries.source: Exact timing of every alley evacuation
entries.value: Tačno vreme svake evakuacije iz sokaka
Tačno kretanje mase na dan suđenja

entries.source: Exact words spoken by ordinary people
entries.value: Tačne reči koje su izgovorili obični ljudi

entries.source: Exactly. Easy comparison and switching give customers leverage over platforms.
entries.value: Upravo tako. Lako poređenje i prebacivanje daju kupcima moć nad platformama.

entries.source: Explain a debugging plan: state the symptom, your first hypothesis, the smallest test, and what each result would mean.
entries.value: Objasni plan za otklanjanje grešaka: navedi simptom, svoju prvu hipotezu, najmanji test i šta bi svaki rezultat značio.

entries.source: Explain a market change by naming the curve that moves, the reason it moves, and what happens to price and quantity.
entries.value: Objasni promenu na tržištu tako što ćeš imenovati krivu koja se pomera, razlog njenog pomeranja i šta se dešava sa cenom i količinom.

entries.source: Explain the idea in your own words, give one example, give one non-example, and apply it to a new case.
entries.value: Objasni ideju svojim rečima, daj jedan primer, jedan primer šta to nije i primeni je na novi slučaj.

entries.source: Expose missing input, risk, time pressure, or unclear scope.
entries.value: Otkrij nedostajući unos, rizik, vremenski pritisak ili nejasan opseg.

entries.source: Fatehpur Sikri was an imperial center
entries.value: Fatehpur Sikri je bio carski centar

entries.source: Faubourg Saint-Antoine on the eve of the Bastille
Fire spreads with wind and dense buildings
entries.value: Vatra se širi uz vetar i gusto zbijene zgrade

entries.source: First question: exactly one simple diagnostic question.
entries.value: Prvo pitanje: tačno jedno jednostavno dijagnostičko pitanje.

entries.source: Fixing the visible error message without tracing the state that produced it.
entries.value: Ispravljanje vidljive poruke o grešci bez praćenja stanja koje ju je proizvelo.

entries.source: Flag important context without crowding every reply.
entries.value: Označi važan kontekst bez pretrpavanja svakog odgovora.

entries.source: Florence was a republic in this period
entries.value: Firenca je u ovom periodu bila republika

entries.source: Follow a historical question through people, objects, and power.
entries.value: Prati istorijsko pitanje kroz ljude, predmete i moć.

entries.source: Follow an ordinary or decisive day with setting, pressure, and choices.
entries.value: Prati običan ili presudan dan kroz okruženje, pritisak i izbore.

entries.source: Food delivery can have intense rivalry, powerful customers, and easy switching, which squeezes profit even when demand is high.
entries.value: Dostava hrane može imati snažno suparništvo, moćne kupce i lako prebacivanje, što pritiska profit čak i kada je potražnja visoka.

entries.source: Food prices, rumors, royal politics, and armed crowds are pushing Paris toward a decisive rupture.
entries.value: Cene hrane, glasine, kraljevska politika i naoružane mase guraju Pariz ka odlučujućem prelomu.

entries.source: Foreign merchants gather in regulated spaces
entries.value: Strani trgovci se okupljaju u regulisanim prostorima

entries.source: Foreignness can be useful and watched
entries.value: Stranost može biti korisna i nadzirana

entries.source: Fractions, supply and demand, Newton's laws...
entries.value: Razlomci, ponuda i potražnja, Njutnovi zakoni...

entries.source: Frequent evidence notes and uncertainty labels.
entries.value: Česte napomene o dokazima i oznake neizvesnosti.

entries.source: frontier, trade route, borderland, ship, monastery, or garrison
entries.value: granica, trgovački put, pograničje, brod, manastir ili garnizon

entries.source: Generated dialogue is simulation, not authenticated quotation.
entries.value: Generisani dijalog je simulacija, ne potvrđeni citat.

entries.source: Give me a topic or paste notes. I will build 12 focused cards with optional hints, traps, and examples.
entries.value: Daj mi temu ili nalepi beleške. Napraviću 12 fokusiranih kartica sa opcionalnim nagoveštajima, zamkama i primerima.

entries.source: Give one parallel example that helps me think without solving my target. End with one question.
entries.value: Daj jedan paralelan primer koji mi pomaže da razmišljam bez rešavanja mog cilja. Završi jednim pitanjem.

entries.source: Good base. Review the misses below.
Good. You tested timing before rewriting the data model.
entries.value: Dobro. Testirao si tajming pre prepisivanja modela podataka.

entries.source: Group similar ideas and name the pattern.
entries.value: Grupiši slične ideje i imenuj obrazac.

entries.source: Guide translates, but locals notice hesitation.
entries.value: Vodič prevodi, ali lokalci primećuju oklevanje.

entries.source: Hand the next move to me. Give me one clear task and wait for my contribution before you revise.
entries.value: Prepusti meni sledeći potez. Daj mi jedan jasan zadatak i sačekaj moj doprinos pre nego što revidiraš.

entries.source: Harbor warehouses near Rome's grain supply
entries.value: Lučka skladišta blizu rimskog snabdevanja žitom

entries.source: Harder mode: after you answer, add a counterexample or a boundary where the idea stops working.
entries.value: Teži režim: nakon što odgovoriš, dodaj kontraprimer ili granicu gde ideja prestaje da važi.
Pomozi mi da debagujem JavaScript promise-e

entries.source: Help me learn supply and demand
entries.value: Pomozi mi da naučim ponudu i potražnju

entries.source: Help me understand supply and demand
entries.value: Pomozi mi da razumem ponudu i potražnju

entries.source: Higher price does not mean demand increased. The tax starts on the supply side by changing seller costs.
entries.value: Viša cena ne znači da je potražnja porasla. Porez počinje na strani ponude tako što menja troškove prodavaca.

entries.source: Historically plausible resident attached to ordinary networks
entries.value: Istorijski verovatan stanovnik povezan sa običnim mrežama

entries.source: Horse sweat, incense, lacquer, copper cash, and languages braided through a regulated market.
entries.value: Konjski znoj, tamjan, lak, bakarni novac i jezici isprepleteni kroz regulisanu pijacu.

entries.source: Hot tar, panicked footsteps, bells, smoke, and the crack of timber in a city built too tightly.
entries.value: Vreo katran, panični koraci, zvona, dim i pucanje greda u gradu izgrađenom pretesno.

entries.source: How any single bystander felt about Socrates
entries.value: Kako se bilo koji pojedinačni posmatrač osećao prema Sokratu

entries.source: How deep should the expedition go?
entries.value: Koliko duboko ekspedicija treba da ide?

entries.source: How do you want to be seen when you arrive?
entries.value: Kako želiš da te vide kada stigneš?

entries.source: How strict should the crossing be?
entries.value: Koliko strog treba da bude prelaz?

entries.source: How strong are you right now?

entries.value: Koliko vidljivo treba da se prikazuju dokazi?

entries.source: I am asking for direct explanation. Give a concise explanation, then require me to restate the corrected idea in my own words.
entries.value: Tražim direktno objašnjenje. Daj sažeto objašnjenje, zatim zatraži od mene da svojim rečima ponovim ispravljenu ideju.

entries.source: I can compress the explanation, but I still need one proof of understanding before unlocking the next step.
entries.value: Mogu da skratim objašnjenje, ali mi i dalje treba jedan dokaz razumevanja pre otključavanja sledećeg koraka.

entries.source: I could not answer right now. Please try again.
entries.value: Trenutno nisam mogao da odgovorim. Pokušaj ponovo.

entries.source: I could not build that deck right now. Try a shorter topic or simpler notes.
entries.value: Trenutno nisam mogao da napravim taj špil. Probaj kraću temu ili jednostavnije beleške.

entries.source: I could not build that quiz right now. Try a simpler topic or try again.
entries.value: Trenutno nisam mogao da napravim taj kviz. Probaj jednostavniju temu ili pokušaj ponovo.

entries.source: I could not save that card review. Please try again.
entries.value: Nisam mogao da sačuvam taj pregled kartice. Pokušaj ponovo.

entries.source: I could not score that answer. Please try again.
entries.value: Nisam mogao da ocenim taj odgovor. Pokušaj ponovo.

entries.source: I will keep the lesson active: hint, repair, slow down, or raise the challenge when you ask.
entries.value: Održaću lekciju aktivnom: nagoveštaj, popravka, usporavanje ili podizanje izazova kada zatražiš.

entries.source: If I am ready, ask me to state the idea in my own words. If not, ask the one question needed before final synthesis.
entries.value: Ako sam spreman/spremna, zamoli me da iznesem ideju svojim rečima. Ako nisam, postavi jedno pitanje koje je potrebno pre završne sinteze.

entries.source: If price rises while volume stays steady, revenue can increase. If costs rise faster, free cash flow may still fall.
entries.value: Ako cena raste dok obim ostaje stabilan, prihod može da poraste. Ako troškovi rastu brže, slobodni novčani tok ipak može da padne.

entries.source: If production costs rise, sellers need a higher price to supply the same quantity, so the supply curve shifts left.
entries.value: Ako troškovi proizvodnje porastu, prodavcima treba viša cena da bi ponudili istu količinu, pa se kriva ponude pomera ulevo.

entries.source: If you understand a concept, you can give an example, a non-example, and solve a small unfamiliar case.
entries.value: Ako razumeš koncept, možeš da daš primer, primer šta to nije i rešiš mali nepoznat slučaj.

entries.source: Ignoring slavery, freed status, and patronage would make your assumptions visibly modern.
entries.value: Zanemarivanje ropstva, statusa oslobođenika i pokroviteljstva učinilo bi tvoje pretpostavke očigledno modernim.
